hero.title:
Building
Intelligent
Systems That Learn
hero.subtitle: I design and deploy machine learning models that solve real-world problems at scale. Specializing in NLP, computer vision, and production AI systems with 5+ years of industry experience.

cards.title: Deep Learning
cards.description: Expertise in designing custom neural architectures for complex pattern recognition and prediction tasks using PyTorch and TensorFlow. Experienced with transformers, GNNs, and diffusion models.

cards.title: MLOps & Production
cards.description: End-to-end pipeline orchestration, model serving, monitoring, and A/B testing at scale using Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, and custom CI/CD pipelines for ML systems.

cards.title: LLMs & Gen AI
cards.description: Fine-tuning and deploying large language models, RAG pipelines, and generative AI solutions for enterprise applications. Built production systems serving 2M+ users.

cards.title: Cloud Architecture
cards.description: Multi-cloud ML infrastructure design on AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, and Azure ML. Cost-optimized training and inference at scale with spot instances and auto-scaling.

cards.title: Research & Innovation
cards.description: Published at NeurIPS, ICML, and ICLR. Open-source contributor with 4K+ cumulative GitHub stars. Passionate about bridging research breakthroughs to production systems.

cards.title: Leadership & Mentoring
cards.description: Led cross-functional teams of ML engineers and researchers. Founded local AI meetup group with 500+ members. Mentored 10+ junior engineers through career transitions.

items.description: Leading development of LLM-powered products serving 2M+ users. Designed RAG architecture reducing hallucination by 40%. Mentoring team of 4 engineers. Deployed fine-tuned Llama 3 models for enterprise document analysis.

Built real-time fraud detection system processing 50K+ events/sec with 99.7% accuracy. Developed custom computer vision pipeline for automated quality inspection. Reduced inference cost by 60% via model quantization.

Published 3 papers at NeurIPS and ICML on graph neural networks. Developed open-source library MolGraph for molecular property prediction (2K+ stars). Built foundational models for drug discovery applications.

Built recommendation engine improving user engagement by 35%. Deployed NLP pipeline for multilingual customer support automation across 8 languages. Implemented A/B testing framework for model evaluation.

items.title: DocuMind AI
items.description: Enterprise RAG system that answers questions over 100K+ document corpora with citation-backed responses and 95% accuracy. Features hybrid search, real-time streaming, and multi-modal support.

items.title: DefectNet
items.description: Real-time manufacturing defect detection system running at 120 FPS on edge devices. Reduced false positives by 60% using novel attention mechanisms and knowledge distillation.

items.title: MolGraph
items.description: Open-source library for molecular property prediction using graph neural networks. 2K+ GitHub stars, used by 500+ researchers worldwide. Includes 20+ pretrained models.

items.title: VoiceFlow
items.description: Real-time speech transcription and translation system leveraging Whisper and custom fine-tuned models. Supports 30+ languages with 98% accuracy and sub-200ms latency.

items.title: OptiPrice
items.description: Dynamic pricing engine using reinforcement learning and demand forecasting. Increased revenue by 23% for an e-commerce platform with 50K+ products across 15 categories.

items.title: SecuraML
items.description: Adversarial ML security toolkit for detecting and defending against model attacks. Includes model poisoning detection, gradient masking, and adversarial training pipelines.

footer.tagline: Building the future, one model at a time.
